arts.ttl: Chelsea: Carney Chukwuemeka joins Borussia Dortmund on loan for rest of season
arts.sum: The young midfielder has seen his career stall with the Blues

arts.ttl: Official: Dortmund take Chelsea midfielder on loan
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have signed Chelsea's Carney Chukwuemeka for the remainder of the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville agree with key Enzo Maresca Chelsea vs West Ham decision
arts.sum: With Robert Sanchez dropped by Enzo Maresca for Chelsea's Monday night clash with West Ham, pundits Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville agree the goalkeeper has 'used up his credits'. Maresca had hinted that there was a choice to be made of who will start in net following Sanchez's recent mistakes in matches against Wolverhampton Wanderers and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Felix close to joining AC Milan on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Joao Felix is close to joining Serie A club AC Milan on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Why David Datro Fofana’s loan recall played key role in Joao Felix’s AC Milan move
Chelsea v West Ham line-ups: Two Blues changes as Sanchez is dropped
arts.sum: Robert Sanchez has been dropped from the Chelsea side for tonight’s London derby at Stamford Bridge. With keeper Sanchez having made a number of errors this season, Filip Jorgensen has been brought in in his place. It is one of two changes to the Chelsea starting line-up – the other sees Tosin Adarabioyo come in […] The post Chelsea v West Ham line-ups: Two Blues changes as Sanchez is dropped appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Chilwell set for Crystal Palace loan
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell is set to join Premier League rivals Crystal Palace on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v West Ham team news: Sanchez dropped, Bowen starts

arts.ttl: Lille approach Rennes for former Manchester City and Chelsea target Abdelhamid Aït Boudlal
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe, Lille OSC have sent an undisclosed offer to Stade Rennais for the centre-back Abdelhamid Aït Boudlal (18). The teenager, an international for Morocco in…

arts.ttl: Chelsea v West Ham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute updates from the 8pm kick-off You can email John with your thoughts Brendan Large gets in touch: “As a Chelsea fan I think dropping Sanchez was a no-brainer today. He hasn’t been as bad as his headlines (mostly) and has made some good saves. But all the noise around him would have made every touch a chance for West Ham fans to put him under pressure. Jorgensen doesn’t look spectacular but seems to be a safe pair of hands (mostly) from his Conference League/Cup appearances. “Good luck to Potter from me. I think the guy had zero chance of succeeding in the Chelsea set-up he was bought in to and I don’t think anyone else would have done any better at the time...but his luck can start after this game. We really need three here to push for CL next season.” Continue reading...
